name: Santos Limited
description: Santos Limited is a prominent Australian energy company engaged in the exploration, development, and production of oil and natural gas. Headquartered in Adelaide, the company operates a diverse portfolio of assets across Australia, Papua New Guinea, Timor-Leste, and the United States. Santos is a major supplier of domestic natural gas and liquefied natural gas (LNG) to Asian markets. Committed to a sustainable energy future, the company is actively investing in carbon capture and storage technologies and pursuing net-zero emissions targets to provide reliable and affordable energy for progress.
